service.name: my-automaton
service.description: A premium MCP automation server offering 7 x402 pay-per-use endpoints (1¢–5¢ each) for web scraping, text summarization, data extraction, content generation, image analysis, code execution, and language translation. Includes a free tier (3 requests/day) for evaluation.
service.tagline: Automate anything — pay per task, not per month.

freeTier.description: 3 complimentary requests per day across all endpoints

endpoints.name: web-scraper
endpoints.description: Scrape and extract content from any public web page

endpoints.name: text-summarizer
endpoints.description: Condense long documents into concise summaries

endpoints.name: data-extractor
endpoints.description: Extract structured data (JSON/CSV) from unstructured text

endpoints.name: content-generator
endpoints.description: Generate human-quality text content for any purpose

endpoints.name: image-analyzer
endpoints.description: Analyze images: captioning, object detection, OCR

endpoints.name: code-executor
endpoints.description: Execute code snippets in a sandboxed environment (Python, JS, etc.)

endpoints.name: translator
endpoints.description: Translate text between 50+ languages with high accuracy

protocol.authentication: x402 HTTP 402 Payment Required — pay-per-request with crypto micropayments

apiKey.description: Optional API key for higher rate limits
